display.purpose: Page-defining titles and the home introduction.

title.purpose: Tab panels, edition sections, and component groups.

label.purpose: Navigation, controls, table headings, and metadata.

shadows.name: overlay-medium
shadows.purpose: Select menus and temporary floating overlays only.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and selected-state color transitions.

motion.name: overlay-fade
motion.purpose: Select and temporary overlay entrances and exits.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The high-emphasis action used once per decision group.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; height: 44px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 20px; border: 0; border-radius: 10px; background: hsl(var(--primary)); color: hsl(var(--primary-foreground)); font: 500 14px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--ring)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.82; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: A secondary action that preserves the page surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; height: 44px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 10px; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); font: 500 14px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: hsl(var(--accent)); color: hsl(var(--accent-foreground)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--ring)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: hsl(var(--secondary)); }

components.name: Select Field
components.description: A compact filter control with a familiar listbox affordance.
components.html: <button class="ds-field" aria-haspopup="listbox">All countries<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; width: 220px; height: 44px; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 10px; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); font: 400 14px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field:hover { background: hsl(var(--accent) / 0.45); } .ds-field:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--ring)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-field:active { background: hsl(var(--accent)); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: A quiet top-level destination with a standard selected state.
components.html: EditionsHall of Fame
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font: 500 14px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: hsl(var(--accent)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--ring)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-link-active { background: hsl(var(--accent)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: A compact text-labelled status marker for guest and unofficial records.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--chart-5) / 0.3); border-radius: 9999px; color: hsl(var(--chart-5)); font: 600 12px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Record Card
components.description: A flat bordered container for content that needs a distinct boundary.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 12px; background: hsl(var(--card)); color: hsl(var(--card-foreground)); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font: 600 20px/1.25 var(--font-poppins), var(--font-inter), sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font: 400 14px/1.625 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Archive Index
components.description: An indexed, divided list of the four primary record destinations.
components.html: 01EditionsFull scoreboards, medal counts, hosts, and per-task results.02CountriesNational participation histories and official medal standings.
components.css: .ds-index { border-top: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); } .ds-index a { display: grid; min-height: 96px; grid-template-columns: 32px 1fr; align-content: center; column-gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); text-decoration: none; } .ds-index span { grid-row: span 2; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font: 600 12px/1.25 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-index strong { font: 600 18px/1.25 var(--font-poppins), var(--font-inter), sans-serif; } .ds-index small { margin-top: 4px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font: 400 14px/1.625 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: The signature record surface for scores, rankings, and history.
components.css: .ds-table-wrap { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 12px; } .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; color: hsl(var(--foreground)); font: 400 14px/1.4 var(--font-inter), system-ui, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-table th { padding: 8px 12px; background: hsl(var(--primary)); color: hsl(var(--primary-foreground)); text-align: left; font-weight: 600; } .ds-table td { padding: 10px 12px; border-top: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: hsl(var(--accent) / 0.6); } .ds-table:focus-within { outline: 2px solid hsl(var(--ring)); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: PAIO Stats should feel like a carefully maintained competition archive opened on a generous desk: orderly, factual, and immediately legible, with moments of ceremony reserved for earned results. A coach or alumnus checking a record in a bright classroom should encounter the light theme first; a contestant browsing late at night should receive the same hierarchy through the dark theme. The interface is a product surface, so familiarity is an advantage. Tables, tabs, links, and controls use standard patterns and compact density. The system rejects sports-betting spectacle, generic SaaS analytics decoration, and unexplained legacy-database density. It celebrates contestants through precise typography, medal semantics, and connected records rather than visual noise.
keyCharacteristics: Table-first information architecture with strong row and column rhythm.
Restrained neutral surfaces with color reserved for data meaning and status.
Flat, bordered hierarchy with very limited overlay elevation.
Poppins headings paired with Inter body and interface text.
Responsive page containers and horizontally scrollable data tables.

rules.name: The Record First Rule
rules.body: Names, results, and relationships always outrank decoration. If a visual treatment slows factual scanning, remove it.

rules.name: The Restrained Color Rule
rules.body: Neutral structure owns the screen. Saturated color appears only when it communicates a score, medal, status, error, or interactive state.

rules.name: The Tabular Clarity Rule
rules.body: Every numeric comparison uses tabular figures and a consistent alignment. Display typography is prohibited inside data cells and controls.

rules.name: The Flat by Default Rule
rules.body: Resting content uses lines and tonal layers. If every card casts a shadow, the hierarchy has failed.

dos: Do reserve medal marker color for earned outcomes, use accessible medal ink for text, and pair color with a label or numeric context.
Do keep body prose near 70 characters per line and let data tables use the width they need.
Do use the shared semantic tokens for every surface, border, state, and data color.
Do preserve familiar table, tab, link, select, and navigation behavior.
Do use 8px, 10px, and 12px radii consistently according to component scale.
donts: Don't turn the product into a sports-betting dashboard that sensationalizes rankings or turns every value into a promotional graphic.
Don't build a generic SaaS analytics page filled with decorative metric cards, gradients, and empty visual effects.
Don't recreate a dense legacy database whose abbreviations, ranking rules, and horizontal tables are unexplained.
Don't use color, flag emoji, or medal sheen as the only carrier of meaning.
Don't nest cards, repeat identical icon-card grids without a task reason, or add decorative glass effects.
Don't animate layout properties or add bounce and elastic easing.
